nodes.name: OpenAI Chat Model (GPT-4o)
nodes.notes: Single shared GPT-4o chat model. Its ai_languageModel output fans out to all four AI agents to keep credentials and config in one place.

nodes.name: OpenAI Embeddings
nodes.notes: Embeddings model used by the Pinecone vector store for RAG retrieval.

nodes.name: Webhook - Multi-Channel Intake
nodes.notes: Single ingress for website chat, email, WhatsApp Business API, Slack and CRM webhooks. Channel is read from the payload `channel` field. Secure with an HMAC header check (validated downstream) and put it behind your API gateway / WAF.

nodes.name: Set - Workflow Config
nodes.notes: Centralises tunable thresholds and channel IDs, all sourced from environment variables so no secret or magic number is hard-coded in business logic.

nodes.name: Code - Normalize & Validate Payload
nodes.notes: Canonicalises heterogeneous channel payloads, rejects empty messages, and stamps a correlationId that threads through enrichment, branching, logging and audit.

nodes.name: Postgres - Audit Log (Intake)
nodes.notes: Immutable audit trail row written at ingest. onError=continueRegularOutput so an audit-DB hiccup never blocks customer processing.

options.systemMessage:
You are an enterprise intent classifier. Respond with ONLY minified JSON, no prose:
{"intent":"<one of: technical_support|sales_inquiry|billing_concern|feature_request|cancellation_request|partnership_opportunity|complaint_escalation|general_inquiry>","confidence":<0..1>,"reasoning":"<short>"}

nodes.name: AI Classification Agent
nodes.notes: Primary intent classifier. Constrained to a strict JSON schema so the downstream Switch can route deterministically.

nodes.name: Code - Parse Classification
nodes.notes: Defensive JSON parsing with a safe fallback to general_inquiry, then re-attaches the canonical context object.

parameters.text:
=Analyse this customer message for emotional + commercial risk signals:
"""
{{ $json.message }}
"""

options.systemMessage:
You are a customer-risk analyst. Respond with ONLY minified JSON:
{"sentiment":"<positive|neutral|negative>","sentimentScore":<-1..1>,"urgency":"<low|medium|high|critical>","clvImpact":"<low|medium|high>","churnProbability":<0..1>}

nodes.name: AI Sentiment Analysis
nodes.notes: Derives emotional state, urgency, CLV impact and a churn-probability score that feed routing and predictive analytics.

nodes.name: Code - Parse Sentiment & Risk
nodes.notes: Parses risk signals and merges them onto the running context for the enrichment fan-out.

nodes.name: HubSpot - Get Contact
nodes.notes: CRM history lookup. onError=continueRegularOutput so a missing contact yields an empty record instead of failing Customer 360.

nodes.name: Salesforce - Get Account
nodes.notes: Secondary CRM enrichment for account/territory context.

nodes.name: Airtable - Lookup Customer
nodes.notes: Operational customer database (segments, flags, owner) stored in Airtable.

parameters.query:
SELECT count(*) AS ticket_count, max(created_at) AS last_seen, avg(satisfaction) AS avg_csat
FROM interactions WHERE customer_email = $1;

nodes.name: Postgres - Customer History
nodes.notes: Behavioural history: ticket frequency, recency, rolling CSAT — feeds predictive scoring.

nodes.name: Stripe - Payment Records
nodes.notes: Billing/subscription signals (MRR, recent charges, failed payments) for revenue + churn context.

nodes.name: Merge - Enrichment Sync
nodes.notes: Synchronisation barrier: waits for all five parallel lookups before Customer 360 assembly runs exactly once.

nodes.name: Code - Build Customer 360
nodes.notes: Builds the unified Customer 360 record consumed by routing, sales, support and predictive lanes.

nodes.name: Switch - Intent Router
nodes.notes: Deterministic 8-way router on classified intent. The fallback (extra) output also feeds the RAG support branch so nothing is dropped.

nodes.name: Code - AI Lead Scoring
nodes.notes: Explainable lead scoring (auditable rules rather than a black-box number) producing a 0-100 score + A/B/C tier.

nodes.name: HTTP - Company Enrichment API
nodes.notes: External firmographic enrichment (Clearbit-style). API key from env var; soft failure so missing data doesn't kill the deal flow.

options.systemMessage: You are an enterprise account executive. Produce a crisp, value-led proposal (<250 words) with a clear next step. No markdown headers.

nodes.name: AI Proposal Writer
nodes.notes: Generates a personalised proposal grounded in the lead score and enrichment context.

nodes.name: IF - Calendar Provider
nodes.notes: Routes meeting creation to Google Calendar (true) or Microsoft Outlook (false) based on the CALENDAR_PROVIDER env var.

nodes.name: Google Calendar - Create Meeting
nodes.notes: Creates the discovery meeting when Google is the configured provider.

nodes.name: Microsoft Outlook - Create Meeting
nodes.notes: Creates the discovery meeting when Outlook is the configured provider.

nodes.name: Merge - Calendar Result
nodes.notes: Re-joins both calendar branches so notifications run once regardless of provider.

parameters.text: =:moneybag: New {{ $json.leadTier }}-tier lead ({{ $json.leadScore }}) from {{ $json.customer.company }}. Meeting booked. Correlation {{ $json.correlationId }}

nodes.name: Slack - Notify Sales Rep
nodes.notes: Real-time Slack alert to the assigned sales rep / channel.

nodes.name: Gmail - Notify Sales Rep
nodes.notes: Emails the rep the AI-generated proposal as a ready-to-send draft.

nodes.name: Pinecone Vector Store - KB Retrieve
nodes.notes: RAG retrieval over the embedded knowledge base. Embeddings supplied by the shared OpenAI Embeddings sub-node.

nodes.name: Notion - Search KB
nodes.notes: Pulls structured KB / FAQ pages from Notion as an additional grounding source.

nodes.name: HTTP - Confluence Search
nodes.notes: No first-party Confluence node exists in n8n; this calls the Confluence Cloud REST search API directly (CQL).

nodes.name: Merge - KB Sources
nodes.notes: Combines Pinecone + Notion + Confluence results into a single context set for the answer generator.

nodes.name: Code - Assemble RAG Context
nodes.notes: Token-bounds and concatenates retrieved knowledge into the grounding context.

nodes.name: OpenAI GPT Agent - Support Response
nodes.notes: The core RAG answering agent. Grounded strictly in retrieved context and self-reports a confidence score that gates escalation.

nodes.name: Code - Parse Answer & Confidence
nodes.notes: Extracts answer + confidence for the escalation gate.

nodes.name: IF - Confidence Threshold
nodes.notes: Confidence gate. True (>= threshold) auto-resolves; false escalates to a human agent.

nodes.name: Gmail - Send AI Resolution
nodes.notes: High-confidence path: send the grounded AI resolution directly to the customer.

parameters.text: =:rotating_light: Escalation [{{ $json.correlationId }}] intent={{ $json.intent }} urgency={{ $json.risk.urgency }} churn={{ $json.risk.churnProbability }}. AI confidence too low — human needed.

nodes.name: Slack - Escalate to Human
nodes.notes: Low-confidence / complaint / cancellation path: hand off to a human with full context.

nodes.name: Wait - SLA Escalation Timer
nodes.notes: Holds the execution to enforce an SLA window before the ticket is finalised / re-pinged.

nodes.name: Postgres - Upsert Support Ticket
nodes.notes: Persists ticket outcome (auto-resolved vs escalated) for resolution-rate KPIs.

parameters.text: =:credit_card: Billing case [{{ $json.correlationId }}] from {{ $json.customer.email }}. Stripe records attached in Customer 360.

nodes.name: Slack - Billing/Finance Alert
nodes.notes: Billing concerns routed to finance with Stripe context already enriched.

nodes.name: Notion - Log Feature Request
nodes.notes: Feature requests captured straight into the product roadmap database.

nodes.name: Code - Churn Save Play
nodes.notes: Builds a retention play for cancellation requests before handing to a human retention owner.

nodes.name: Slack - Partnerships Alert
nodes.notes: Partnership opportunities routed to the BD/partnerships channel.

nodes.name: Code - Assemble Predictive Features
nodes.notes: Feature engineering from interaction history, sentiment and billing signals.

nodes.name: Code - Predictive Scoring
nodes.notes: Deterministic, auditable predictive layer (swap in a real ML model endpoint via HTTP when ready).

nodes.name: Postgres - Store Predictions
nodes.notes: Persists predictions for dashboards and trend analysis.

nodes.name: HTTP - Dashboard Data Export
nodes.notes: Pushes the prediction record to the executive dashboard ingest endpoint (Metabase/Looker/Grafana, etc.).

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook - Acknowledge
nodes.notes: Returns a fast 200 acknowledgement (with correlationId) so callers aren't blocked while heavy branches run asynchronously.

parameters.content:
## 1. Multi-Channel Intake
Single webhook for web chat, email, WhatsApp, Slack & CRM webhooks. Normalises payloads, validates, stamps a correlationId and writes an audit row.

## 2. AI Cognition
Classification agent (8 intents) + sentiment/risk agent (sentiment, urgency, CLV impact, churn probability). All agents share one GPT-4o model.

## 3. Customer 360 Enrichment
Parallel lookups across HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable, Postgres history & Stripe, merged into a single record.

## 4. Intent Router
8-way Switch + fallback. Sends each intent to its specialist branch.

## 5. Sales Intelligence
Lead scoring -> firmographic enrichment -> AI proposal -> calendar (Google/Outlook) -> Slack + Gmail rep alerts.

## 6. Support RAG
Pinecone + Notion + Confluence retrieval -> grounded GPT answer with confidence. Below threshold => human escalation.

## 7. Predictive BI
Feature engineering -> churn / expansion / MRR scoring -> Postgres + dashboard export.
